name: soreavis-skills
description: Pre-ship audit suite for Claude Code: security, code quality, dependencies, compliance, accessibility, SEO, forms, responsive, deploy readiness, and LLM hallucination risk — plus an orchestrator and a report differ.

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: 13 audit skills under one plugin (/audit:all, /audit:security, /audit:deep, …). Run any audit individually, or /audit:all to orchestrate the whole suite into one combined scorecard.
